---
title: "Types"
description: "Browse the API reference by type."
body-classes: "cpp-api-page cpp-api-types-page"
---

| Kind | Name | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| struct | [`SceneInputs`](#scene-inputs) | Selected input file paths. |
| struct | [`PoseSample`](#pose-sample) | One sample from the reference pose stream. |
| struct | [`ImuSample`](#imu-sample) | One sample from the input IMU stream. |
| struct | [`WheelSpeedSample`](#wheel-speed-sample) | One wheel-speed CAN sample from `zoe_veh_info`. |
| struct | [`LoadedScene`](#loaded-scene) | Loaded reference-pose, IMU, and wheel-speed streams. |
| struct | [`GpsSample`](#gps-sample) | One synthetic 2D GPS sample. |
| struct | [`StartupInitialization`](#startup-initialization) | Initialization data required to start the filter. |
| struct | [`GpsUpdateResult`](#gps-update-result) | Diagnostics from one 2D GPS update. |
| struct | [`EskfLogRow`](#eskf-log-row) | One in-memory log row corresponding to one GPS update. |
| struct | [`EskfRunResult`](#eskf-run-result) | In-memory result from a full post-startup ESKF run. |
| class | [`Eskf`](#eskf) | Error-state Kalman filter over position, velocity, and attitude. |

## `SceneInputs` {#scene-inputs}

Selected input file paths.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L12">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct SceneInputs
```
:::

**Fields**

- `pose_path`: Pose file path.
- `imu_path`: IMU file path.
- `wheel_speed_path`: Wheel-speed file path.

## `PoseSample` {#pose-sample}

One sample from the reference pose stream.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L19">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct PoseSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds as std::int64_t.
- `pos`: Reference global position in meters.
- `orientation`: Reference orientation quaternion in [w, x, y, z].
- `vel`: Reference ego-frame velocity sample in m/s.

## `ImuSample` {#imu-sample}

One sample from the input IMU stream.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L29">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct ImuSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds.
- `specific_force`: Measured specific force in frame I.
- `rotation_rate`: Measured angular velocity in frame I.
- `q_AI`: Quaternion from frame I to gravity-aligned frame A.

## `WheelSpeedSample` {#wheel-speed-sample}

One wheel-speed CAN sample from `zoe_veh_info`.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L43">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct WheelSpeedSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds.
- `fl_wheel_speed_rpm`: Front-left wheel speed in rpm.
- `fr_wheel_speed_rpm`: Front-right wheel speed in rpm.
- `rl_wheel_speed_rpm`: Rear-left wheel speed in rpm.
- `rr_wheel_speed_rpm`: Rear-right wheel speed in rpm.

## `LoadedScene` {#loaded-scene}

Loaded reference-pose, IMU, and wheel-speed streams.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L52">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct LoadedScene
```
:::

**Fields**

- `pose_samples`: Loaded pose samples.
- `imu_samples`: Loaded IMU samples.
- `wheel_speed_samples`: Loaded wheel-speed samples.

## `GpsSample` {#gps-sample}

One synthetic 2D GPS sample.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L60">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct GpsSample
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: Timestamp in microseconds as std::int64_t.
- `xy`: Measured horizontal position in meters.

## `StartupInitialization` {#startup-initialization}

Initialization data required to start the filter.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/scene_types.hpp#L66">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct StartupInitialization
```
:::

**Fields**

- `v0_G`: Initial velocity in frame G at `previous_imu_utime`.
- `p0_G`: Initial position in frame G at `previous_imu_utime`.
- `q0_GI`: Initial attitude quaternion from the startup state's IMU frame to G at `previous_imu_utime`.
- `first_unprocessed_imu_index`: First IMU sample to pass to `Eskf::Predict` after initialization.
- `first_unprocessed_gps_index`: First GPS sample not used by initialization.
- `previous_imu_utime`: IMU timestamp of the stored state used as t_{k-1} by the first post-initialization Predict.

## `GpsUpdateResult` {#gps-update-result}

Diagnostics from one 2D GPS update.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L11">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct GpsUpdateResult
```
:::

**Fields**

- `innovation_xy`: Horizontal innovation in meters.
- `nis`: Normalized innovation squared.

## `EskfLogRow` {#eskf-log-row}

One in-memory log row corresponding to one GPS update.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/runtime_loop.hpp#L11">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct EskfLogRow
```
:::

**Fields**

- `utime`: GPS update timestamp in microseconds.
- `estimated_position_G`: Estimated position after the GPS update.
- `gps_xy`: GPS measurement used in the update.
- `true_xy`: Pose-truth horizontal position at the same timestamp.
- `innovation_xy`: Horizontal innovation returned by the GPS update.
- `nis`: Normalized innovation squared for the update.
- `estimator_error_xy`: Horizontal estimator error relative to pose truth.
- `estimator_error_norm`: Norm of estimator_error_xy.

## `EskfRunResult` {#eskf-run-result}

In-memory result from a full post-startup ESKF run.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/runtime_loop.hpp#L27">source</a></div>

```cpp
struct EskfRunResult
```
:::

**Fields**

- `log_rows`: One row per GPS update after startup.
- `num_gps_updates`: Number of processed GPS updates.
- `raw_gps_rmse_xy`: Raw GPS horizontal RMSE.
- `eskf_rmse_xy`: ESKF horizontal RMSE.

## `Eskf` {#eskf}

Error-state Kalman filter over position, velocity, and attitude.

**Signature**

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L18">source</a></div>

```cpp
class Eskf
```
:::

### Methods

#### `Initialize()`

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L28">source</a></div>

```cpp
void Initialize(const StartupInitialization& startup_initialization);
```
:::

Initialize the filter from the startup initialization.

##### Non-obvious behavior

This seeds the nominal state and covariance for the first live
IMU/GPS updates after startup.

##### Inputs

- `startup_initialization`: Startup state used to begin filtering.

#### `Predict()`

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L41">source</a></div>

```cpp
void Predict(const ImuSample& current_imu_sample);
```
:::

Propagate the filter from the previous IMU sample to the current one.

##### Inputs

- `current_imu_sample`: Current IMU sample k used for propagation from t_{k-1} to t_k.

##### Preconditions

`Initialize()` has been called.

##### Throws

`std::runtime_error` If the filter is not initialized.

#### `UpdateGps()`

::: {.cpp-api-signature-block}
<div class="cpp-api-signature-source"><a href="https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L55">source</a></div>

```cpp
GpsUpdateResult UpdateGps(const GpsSample& gps_sample);
```
:::

Update the filter with one 2D GPS position measurement.

##### Inputs

- `gps_sample`: GPS measurement at the current update time.

##### Output

Innovation and NIS from this GPS update.

##### Preconditions

`Initialize()` has been called.

##### Throws

`std::runtime_error` If the filter is not initialized, if the innovation covariance cannot be factorized, or if the state covariance becomes numerically invalid during the update.

### Accessors

| Signature | Description | Output | Preconditions | Throws |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`const Eigen::Vector3d& PositionG() const`](https://github.com/jreich218/imu-gps-eskf/blob/main/include/eskf.hpp#L66) | Get the current nominal position in frame G. | Current nominal position in frame G. | `Initialize()` has been called. | `std::runtime_error` If the filter is not initialized. |
